name: Southern Cream Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine sugar, flour, sour cream, eggs, and vanilla until smooth.
3. Core, peel, and chop apples. Boil in water with lemon juice for 3-5 minutes until tender.
4. Drain apples and add to the mixture.
5. Pour into pastry shells.
6. Bake at 400°F for 30 minutes.
7. Make topping: mix 3/4 cup flour, 1/2 cup butter, 1/8 cup sugar, and cinnamon until crumbly.
8. Remove pies from oven and cover with topping.
9. Place under broiler until topping bubbles. Keep an eye on them while broiling.
10. Uneaten pie should be refrigerated.
